stories.title: Jonathan David's hat trick carries Canada in domin...
Pulisic still training solo a day before U.S. game...
stories.summary: U.S. manager Maurico Pochettino said star attacker Christian Pulisic is doing "much better'" in terms of the injury to his left calf, but will be assessed by the medical staff tonight to determine his availability to play against Australia on Friday.

stories.title: Brunson slams skeptics as Knicks revel in parade
stories.summary: Jalen Brunson finally hit back at his skeptics as the Knicks and millions of fans celebrated the franchise's first NBA championship in 53 years with a parade Thursday.

stories.title: Sources: MLB proposes amateur-entry overhaul
stories.summary: MLB's proposed changes include cutting amateur signing bonuses by more than $150M, making high school players ineligible for the draft and instituting an international draft.

stories.title: Fresher than listed: Sauce says he's 24, not 25
stories.summary: Colts cornerback Sauce Gardner says he's 24 years old, not 25 as he's listed in many corners of the internet.
